task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer dashboard or interface is visible, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Application Log Source configuration page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add Application Log' or similar configuration screen is open in the EventLog Analyzer interface.

task_completion.description: Set the display name and application type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The display name field contains 'webserver-01' and the application type selection shows 'Apache'.

task_completion.description: Set the log file path and format
task_completion.visual_evidence: The log file path field contains '/home/ga/log_samples/apache_access.log' and the log format is set to 'Apache Combined Log Format'.

task_completion.description: Verify the source is successfully added to configured sources
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message or a list of configured application log sources displaying 'webserver-01'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer web interface to configure the log source
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer UI, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The web browser address bar and page content correspond to the genuine ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer application, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI to insert the log source directly into the database
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots showing SQL queries or database client interfaces being used to add the log source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target log source name is 'webserver-01' and the application type is 'Apache'. The target log file is located at '/home/ga/log_samples/apache_access.log'.
